full_name: UL 2054:2021 (R2022) - Standard for Safety for Household and Commercial Batteries (Third Edition)
ocr_quality: 良好（PDF 直接提取，英文內容完整，但部分頁面有版權水印）

conditions.duration: 直到起火/爆炸、完全放電 (<0.2 V)、或溫度恢復至環境±10°C
conditions.fault_condition: 負載電路中任何保護裝置的單一故障
conditions.paper_test: 5 個樣品中的 1 個在軟木表面覆蓋薄紙和粗棉布下測試

criteria.description: 應無爆炸、無起火、無化學洩漏；鋰電池內部電芯溫度≤150°C；薄紙和粗棉布不應起火

exemptions: 單電池組且電池已通過 11.1-11.6 測試可豁免 11.8-11.12
tests.original_text_snippet: 11 Short-Circuit Test: Fully charged sample short-circuited with 80±20 mΩ at 20°C and 55°C. Non-compliant: explosion, fire, chemical leak. Cell temp ≤150°C for lithium.

conditions.primary_soc: 放電至製造商規定容量
conditions.secondary_soc: 以 0.2C/1h 放電至終止電壓
conditions.charging_current: 3×Ic（製造商規定的最大充電電流）
conditions.secondary_duration: 達到充電結束條件後再加 7 h
conditions.fault_condition: 充電電路中單一故障（可能導致過充電）
conditions.protective_device: 可重置保護裝置允許重置並繼續測試（至少 10 次循環）

criteria.description: 應無爆炸、無起火、無化學洩漏

tests.original_text_snippet: 12 Abnormal Charging Test: 3×Ic charging current. Primary: min 7 h. Secondary: end-of-charge + 7 h. Non-compliant: explosion, fire, chemical leak.

conditions.voltage: 足以維持 10×C5 安培率的供電電壓
conditions.duration: 直到爆炸、排氣、保護裝置啟動且溫度穩定
conditions.protective_device: 可重置保護裝置允許重置至少 10 次
conditions.additional_test: 至少 1 個樣品以 5×C5 安培率測試

tests.original_text_snippet: 13 Abusive Overcharge Test: 10×C5 rate charging until explosion, vent, or protection operates. Non-compliant: explosion, fire.

tests.applicability: 僅適用於多串聯電池應用（如電池組）

conditions.setup: 完全放電的電池與完全充電的同類型電池串聯
conditions.series_cells: 串聯電池數量 = 電池組總電池數 - 1
conditions.parallel_strings: 串聯電池數量 = 電池組總電池數 - 放電並聯串電池數
conditions.duration: 直到起火/爆炸、完全放電、或溫度恢復至環境±10°C

exemptions: 僅適用於多串聯配置的電池
tests.original_text_snippet: 14 Forced-Discharge Test: For multi-cell series applications. Discharged cell connected in series with charged cells, short-circuited with 80±20 mΩ. Non-compliant: explosion, fire.

conditions.measurement: Uoc（開路電壓）、Isc（短路電流）、S（視在功率）
conditions.limits_table_15_2: 使用過流保護裝置時的限制
conditions.measurement_time: 電子電路或 PTC 保護後 5 秒，其他情況 60 秒

criteria.description: 輸出應符合表 15.1 或 15.2 的限制；符合要求的電池可標記為 'LPS'

exemptions: 可選測試（僅在製造商請求時進行）
tests.original_text_snippet: 15 Limited Power Source Test: Optional. Measures Uoc, Isc, S. Limits per Table 15.1 (without OCPD) or 15.2 (with OCPD). Compliant batteries may be marked 'LPS'.

conditions.output_test: 充滿電的電池組以恆定電阻負載放電，電流設為略低於放電保護電路工作限值
conditions.input_test: 完全放電的電池組以 CCCV 方法充電，電流不超過 3×最大充電電流或充電保護限值
conditions.stabilization: 連續 3 次讀數（間隔≥15 min）無進一步增加
conditions.protective_devices: 測試期間保護裝置不應啟動

criteria.description: 溫度敏感元件的溫度不應超過表 16.1 規定的限值

tests.original_text_snippet: 16 Battery Pack Component Temperature Test: Input/output loading until thermal stabilization. Temperatures shall not exceed limits in Table 16.1.

conditions.output_test: 充滿電的電池組以恆定電阻負載放電
conditions.input_test: 完全放電的電池組以 CCCV 方法充電
conditions.stabilization: 連續 3 次讀數（間隔≥15 min）無進一步增加
conditions.protective_devices: 測試期間保護裝置不應啟動

criteria.description: 外部可接觸表面的溫度不應超過表 17.1 規定的限值

tests.original_text_snippet: 17 Battery Pack Surface Temperature Test: Input/output loading until thermal stabilization. Surface temperatures shall not exceed limits in Table 17.1.

conditions.orientation: 圓柱/方型：縱軸平行於平面；方型需旋轉 90°測試寬窄兩面；鈕扣型：平面平行

tests.original_text_snippet: 18 Crush Test: Battery crushed between two flat surfaces to 13±1.0 kN. Non-compliant: explosion, fire.

conditions.apparatus: 15.8 ± 0.1 mm (5/8 英寸) 直徑棒橫置於電池中心
conditions.orientation: 圓柱/方型：縱軸平行於平面且垂直於棒；方型需旋轉 90°測試寬窄兩面；鈕扣型：平面平行
conditions.impact_count: 每個樣品僅承受 1 次衝擊

tests.original_text_snippet: 19 Impact Test: 9.10 kg weight dropped from 610 mm onto 15.8 mm diameter bar across battery center. Non-compliant: explosion, fire.

conditions.acceleration: 初始 3 ms 內最小平均加速度 75 gn，峰值加速度 125-175 gn
conditions.directions: 3 個互相垂直方向各 3 次衝擊（若只有 2 個對稱軸則測試 2 個方向）

criteria.description: 應無爆炸、無起火、無排氣、無洩漏

tests.original_text_snippet: 20 Shock Test: 3 shocks in 3 mutually perpendicular directions, 75g avg (first 3 ms), 125-175g peak. Examine after 6 h. Non-compliant: explosion, fire, vent, leak.

conditions.frequency: 10-55 Hz，1 Hz/min 速率，90-100 min/循環
conditions.directions: 3 個互相垂直方向（若只有 2 個對稱軸則測試 2 個方向）

criteria.description: 應無爆炸、無起火、無排氣、無洩漏

tests.original_text_snippet: 21 Vibration Test: 0.8 mm amplitude, 10-55 Hz, 90-100 min/cycle in 3 directions. Examine after 6 h. Non-compliant: explosion, fire, vent, leak.

tests.applicability: 僅適用於帶外殼的電池組

conditions.tool: 直徑 30 mm (1.2 英寸) 圓形平面

criteria.description: 應無爆炸、無起火、外殼不應破裂至電芯或保護裝置暴露、無排氣、無洩漏

exemptions: 僅適用於帶外殼的電池組
tests.original_text_snippet: 23 Steady Force Test: 250±10 N for 5 s on top, bottom, sides with 30 mm diameter tool. Examine after 6 h. Non-compliant: explosion, fire, exposure, vent, leak.

tests.applicability: 僅適用於帶塑料外殼的電池組

conditions.preparation: 完全放電或使用假電池防止過熱

criteria.description: 外殼不應破裂、翹曲、熔化至電芯或保護裝置暴露

exemptions: 僅適用於帶塑料外殼的電池組
tests.original_text_snippet: 24 Mold Stress Relief Test: 70°C (or T_max+10°C) for 7 h. Non-compliant: crack, warp, melt exposing cells or protection.

tests.applicability: 僅適用於帶外殼的電池組

conditions.orientation: 最可能產生不利結果的位置
conditions.cold_conditioning: 若用於 0°C 以下的塑料外殼電池組，需先在 0°C 調節 3 小時

criteria.description: 應無爆炸、無起火、外殼不應破裂至電芯或保護裝置暴露、無排氣、無洩漏、保護裝置完整性維持

exemptions: 僅適用於帶外殼的電池組
tests.original_text_snippet: 25 Drop Impact Test: 3 samples dropped 3 times from 1 m onto concrete. Examine after 6 h. Non-compliant: explosion, fire, exposure, vent, leak.

conditions.setup: 電池放置在 102 mm (4 英寸) 直徑孔上的鋼絲網（20 孔/英寸，0.43 mm 線徑）
conditions.heat_source: 本生燈，燃料和空氣流量設定使鋼絲網發亮紅色
conditions.cage: 八面體金屬絲網籠（610 mm × 305 mm，0.25 mm 鋁線，16-18 線/英寸）
conditions.duration: 直到爆炸或電池燃燒殆盡

criteria.description: 爆炸時不應有部件穿透或穿出金屬絲網籠

tests.original_text_snippet: 26 Projectile Test: Battery heated on screen until explosion or burnout. Covered with 8-sided wire cage. Non-compliant: parts penetrate cage.

conditions.oven_type: 重力對流或循環空氣烤箱

tests.original_text_snippet: 27 Heating Test: Heat at 5±2°C/min to 130±2°C, hold 10 min. Non-compliant: explosion, fire.

criteria.description: 應無爆炸、無起火、無排氣、無洩漏

tests.original_text_snippet: 28 Temperature Cycling Test: 10 cycles: 70°C/4h → 20°C/2h → -40°C/4h → 20°C. Store 24 h at 20°C. Non-compliant: explosion, fire, vent, leak.

procedure: 用浸水的布手擦 15 秒
用浸石油精（脂肪族溶劑己烷）的布手擦 15 秒
conditions.alternative: 可使用試劑級己烷（≥85% 正己烷）替代

criteria.description: 標籤應保持清晰、無損壞（包括捲曲）、不易手動移除

exemptions: 已按先前評估計劃評估的粘合劑標籤可豁免
tests.original_text_snippet: 29 Label Permanence Test: Label rubbed 15 s with water-soaked cloth, then 15 s with petroleum spirit. Non-compliant: illegible, damaged, easily removable.

exemptions_summary.exemption: 僅適用於多串聯配置的電池
可選測試（僅在製造商請求時進行）
僅適用於帶外殼的電池組
僅適用於帶塑料外殼的電池組
單電池組且電池已通過 11.1-11.6 測試可豁免
已按先前評估計劃評估的粘合劑標籤可豁免

metadata.extraction_method: Manual reading and analysis of complete .md file (PDF extraction)
metadata.ocr_quality_notes: OCR 品質良好，使用 PDF 直接提取，英文內容完整，章節編號清晰。UL 2054 是家用和商用電池的通用安全標準，涵蓋一次性（初級）和可充電（二級）電池。測試涵蓋電氣、機械、火災暴露、環境、標籤等。2022 年修訂僅更正公式，無要求變更。
